1.title: The Dragon Soars
1.verse:
The dragon soars into the boundless sky,
Clouds part to reveal the sun on high.
All endeavors meet with swift success,
A life of joy and boundless happiness.
1.interpretation: An incredibly auspicious draw. Whatever you are planning to do, proceed with confidence. Success, wealth, and happiness are highly favored.

2.title: The Whale Rides the Waves
2.verse:
The mighty whale swims free across the sea,
A dragon rising, glorious and free.
Your vast ambitions soon will take their flight,
Success and honor shine incredibly bright.
2.interpretation: An incredibly auspicious reading. It indicates a sudden rise in status or the successful launch of a major endeavor. Your talents will finally be recognized, bringing great rewards.

3.title: The Swallow Builds a Nest
3.verse:
The swallow gathers mud in early spring,
To build a nest where little birds may sing.
Though labor is required day by day,
A peaceful home will make the effort pay.
3.interpretation: A neutral but hopeful fortune. Success will not come overnight or through luck, but through steady, diligent effort. Build your foundations carefully.

4.title: The Broken Mirror Rejoined
4.verse:
A mirror shattered finds its missing half,
Replacing sorrow with a joyful laugh.
What once was lost is brought back to your door,
And broken bonds are mended as before.
4.interpretation: A positive sign, especially for relationships or lost opportunities. Reconciliation and recovery are favored. Something you thought was gone forever will return to you.

5.title: Digging for a Spring
5.verse:
You dig the earth to find a hidden spring,
But dirt and gravel are the only thing.
Keep striking deep beneath the heavy stone,
Until the crystal waters are your own.
5.interpretation: A reading signifying a period of hard work with delayed results. You may feel frustrated by a lack of immediate progress, but persistence is key. Do not give up halfway.

6.title: The Stranded Boat
6.verse:
A heavy boat is stranded on the sand,
With neither wind nor tide to leave the land.
To push it forward is a useless chore,
Just wait until the water fills the shore.
6.interpretation: A difficult situation where progress is currently impossible. Do not force things right now, as it will only exhaust you. Wait patiently for the circumstances to change naturally.

7.title: The Scholar Passes the Exam
7.verse:
Ten years of study by the lantern's light,
Rewards the scholar with a future bright.
Your name is written on the golden board,
A joyous harvest and a just reward.
7.interpretation: A very positive sign for career, studies, or official matters. Your past efforts are about to pay off with recognition and success.

8.title: The Bamboo in the Wind
8.verse:
The slender bamboo bends but does not break,
Through howling winds and storms that make the earth shake.
Yield to the pressure, do not stand too tall,
And you will rise again without a fall.
8.interpretation: A time to be flexible and adaptable. You may face opposition or strong forces. Do not resist them directly; instead, bend like the bamboo and you will survive unharmed.

9.title: The Phoenix Returns to the Nest
9.verse:
A brilliant phoenix leaves the starry night,
Returning home bathed in a golden light.
Prosperity and harmony align,
A perfect union by a grand design.
9.interpretation: An exceptional fortune indicating ultimate harmony, joyous reunions, or a highly successful marriage or partnership. Wealth and happiness will fill your home.

10.title: The Lost Sheep
10.verse:
The shepherd sleeps, the little sheep strays far,
Lost in the mountains under no guiding star.
The wolves are howling in the darkening wood,
A risky journey with no likelihood of good.
10.interpretation: A warning against carelessness or wandering off your proven path. You are vulnerable right now. Stick to what is safe and avoid trusting strangers or taking gambles.

11.title: The Fire in the Dry Grass
11.verse:
A single spark upon the parched estate,
Consumes the fields before it is too late.
The roaring flames devour the autumn yield,
Leaving but ashes on the barren field.
11.interpretation: A severe warning of sudden loss, disaster, or overwhelming conflict. Take extreme precautions in your business and personal life. Avoid arguments and risky investments entirely.

12.title: Waiting for the Ferry
12.verse:
You stand upon the river's misty shore,
The ferryman is on the other door.
You cannot swim across the rushing tide,
Just sit and wait upon the water's side.
12.interpretation: Progress is currently halted by circumstances outside your control. You must wait for the right time or the right person to help you move forward. Patience is essential.

13.title: The Merchant's Full Ship
13.verse:
The trading ship returns from overseas,
Carried along by a favorable breeze.
The holds are bursting with a precious store,
Wealth and abundance lay upon the shore.
13.interpretation: A highly favorable fortune for business, trade, and financial matters. Your investments will yield excellent returns, and smooth sailing is ahead.

14.title: The Emperor's Edict
14.verse:
A messenger arrives by royal command,
Bringing great honors to your waiting hand.
The highest gates are thrown wide open now,
Fame and fortune gather at your brow.
14.interpretation: One of the most auspicious lots. You will receive great news, promotion, or support from highly influential people. Everything you attempt will be met with overwhelming success.

15.title: The Moth and the Flame
15.verse:
The foolish moth is drawn unto the light,
Ignoring danger in the starry night.
The burning candle is a fatal trap,
Bringing destruction in a sudden snap.
15.interpretation: A dire warning against temptation or blind ambition. What looks attractive and promising right now may lead to your downfall. Step back and re-evaluate your desires.

16.title: Planting the Jade Tree
16.verse:
You plant a seed of jade within the earth,
And watch it grow into a thing of worth.
Its branches shelter you from sun and rain,
A lasting legacy of honest gain.
16.interpretation: A sign of long-term success and stable growth. It is a good time to start a family, build a business, or invest in property. The foundation you lay now will last.

17.title: The Golden Carp Crosses the Fall
17.verse:
The golden carp swims hard against the stream,
To leap the dragon gate and catch the dream.
With one great bound, the transformation nears,
And washes away all your former fears.
17.interpretation: A time of significant breakthrough. Your strenuous efforts are about to elevate your status or bring you to a much higher level of success.

18.title: The Waning Moon
18.verse:
The silver moon grows thinner in the night,
And casts upon the earth a weaker light.
Do not begin a journey in the dark,
But wait until the dawn ignites a spark.
18.interpretation: Energy and momentum are currently low. It is not the right time to start new projects. Rest and conserve your strength until conditions improve.

19.title: The Hidden Tiger
19.verse:
The forest path is quiet, dark, and deep,
But in the shadows, danger does not sleep.
A hungry tiger waits behind the stone,
It is unwise to walk this road alone.
19.interpretation: Be extremely vigilant. There are unseen threats or deceitful people around you. Avoid dangerous investments and do not trust easily.

20.title: The Jade Courtyard
20.verse:
The courtyard shines with emeralds and jade,
A solid fortune that will never fade.
Your family gathers in a joyous ring,
And every season feels like early spring.
20.interpretation: An incredibly prosperous omen. Wealth, domestic harmony, and lasting joy are assured. All aspects of life are blessed with abundance.

21.title: The Broken Bridge
21.verse:
The raging river sweeps the bridge away,
You cannot cross, no matter what you pay.
The road ahead is shattered and destroyed,
A dangerous path that you must now avoid.
21.interpretation: A complete blockage of your plans. Pushing forward will lead to disaster. You must turn back, abandon current risky ventures, and seek an entirely different route.

22.title: The Floating Cloud
22.verse:
A lonely cloud drifts aimless in the sky,
With no clear home to rest its weary eye.
The winds of chance dictate where it will go,
A fleeting journey that is drifting slow.
22.interpretation: A period of instability and lack of direction. You may feel like you are just drifting. Focus on finding your anchor rather than making permanent decisions right now.

23.title: The Blooming Lotus
23.verse:
From muddy waters rises something pure,
A fragrant lotus, steadfast and secure.
Though surrounded by the dirt and daily grind,
True clarity and beauty you will find.
23.interpretation: A positive sign of overcoming a messy or difficult situation. You will rise above the negativity and achieve a respectable and peaceful outcome.

24.title: The Empty Net
24.verse:
You cast your net into the empty sea,
But catch no fish, however hard it be.
The tides are wrong, the silver fish have fled,
You return home with heavy heart and dread.
24.interpretation: A warning of wasted effort and poor timing. Your current endeavors are unlikely to yield any results. Stop wasting your resources and wait for a better opportunity.

25.title: Blooming Spring
25.verse:
Winter's chill begins to fade away,
Spring blossoms open to the light of day.
Patience brings the reward you seek,
A gentle breeze upon the mountain peak.
25.interpretation: Good things are coming, but they require patience. Like a flower blooming in spring, your efforts will naturally bear fruit in due time.

26.title: The Guiding Lantern
26.verse:
The night is dark, the mountain pass is steep,
But someone leaves a lantern for you to keep.
Its gentle flame will show you where to tread,
And safely guide you to the path ahead.
26.interpretation: Help will arrive when you need it most. A mentor, friend, or unexpected benefactor will offer guidance that leads you out of confusion and into success.

27.title: The Crane in the Pines
27.verse:
The ancient crane rests in the mountain pine,
A symbol of a long and favored line.
Good health, deep peace, and honor will increase,
A golden age where every trouble ceases.
27.interpretation: A highly auspicious fortune representing longevity, stability, and high honors. You will enjoy a long period of peace and respect from those around you.

28.title: The Hidden Pearl
28.verse:
The oyster hides a pearl of purest white,
Deep in the ocean, far away from light.
Dive bravely down beneath the rolling sea,
A precious treasure waits for you and me.
28.interpretation: A hidden talent, asset, or opportunity is about to be discovered. Do not be afraid to look beneath the surface or do the deep work required to claim your reward.

29.title: The Parched Earth
29.verse:
The dusty fields are waiting for the rain,
The farmer gazes at the barren plain.
The skies are heavy but the drops are few,
Just wait until the heavens start anew.
29.interpretation: A period of waiting and endurance. You have prepared the ground, but you cannot force the results to appear faster. Be patient; the nourishment you need will come in time.

30.title: The Sinking Vessel
30.verse:
The mighty vessel strikes a hidden reef,
The roaring ocean offers no relief.
The cargo spills into the darkened wave,
There is but little left for you to save.
30.interpretation: A severe warning of catastrophic failure or major loss. Abandon current risky ventures immediately. Focus entirely on damage control and preserving your personal safety rather than material wealth.

31.title: The Morning Sun
31.verse:
The golden sun ascends the eastern sky,
The shadows vanish as the light draws nigh.
The darkest winter night is left behind,
A brilliant, warming future you will find.
31.interpretation: A supreme fortune of new beginnings and ultimate clarity. All confusion and sorrow will dissipate, making way for boundless success, joy, and vitality.

32.title: Walking on Thin Ice
32.verse:
The frozen lake is cracking at your feet,
A single step could mean a cold defeat.
The winter wind is howling through the pine,
A dangerous path across a fragile line.
32.interpretation: Extreme caution is needed. You are in a precarious situation where one wrong move could lead to disaster. Tread lightly, avoid taking sides, and back away from unnecessary risks.

33.title: The Caged Bird
33.verse:
The songbird sits within a golden cage,
And sings a song of sorrow to the sage.
Though food and water are provided here,
The open sky is what the heart holds dear.
33.interpretation: You may feel restricted or trapped by your current circumstances, even if they are comfortable. This is a time of safety, but not of freedom. Endure it until the door is opened.

34.title: The Welcoming Inn
34.verse:
A weary traveler finds a resting place,
With warm provisions and a friendly face.
The heavy burden falls upon the floor,
A peaceful slumber safely past the door.
34.interpretation: A highly favorable sign for travel, finding a safe haven, or receiving hospitality. You will find comfort, supportive allies, and a welcoming environment in your upcoming endeavors.

35.title: The Broken Jade
35.verse:
A precious carving falls upon the ground,
Its perfect beauty shattered all around.
What took a lifetime's labor to create,
Is lost forever to a careless fate.
35.interpretation: A warning against carelessness or neglecting what is valuable to you. Relationships or delicate projects may suffer a severe fracture if you do not handle them with extreme care.

36.title: The Swift Steed
36.verse:
A thousand miles upon a steed of swift,
A journey blessed by fortune's greatest gift.
The mountains fly past in a sudden blur,
A winning race for him who uses spur.
36.interpretation: Rapid progress and successful travel are indicated. Things will move much faster than you expected, and you have the energy and momentum to cross the finish line victoriously.

37.title: The Dragon's Rain
37.verse:
The azure dragon summons heavy showers,
Reviving all the wilting fields and flowers.
A mighty force comes from the heavens high,
To end the drought and make the rivers fly.
37.interpretation: A magnificent blessing where long-held prayers are finally answered. A powerful benefactor or a massive stroke of luck will completely transform your situation for the better.

38.title: The Blooming Orchid
38.verse:
Deep in the valley where the shadows play,
An orchid blooms to greet the breaking day.
Its quiet fragrance fills the morning air,
A gentle beauty blooming without care.
38.interpretation: A positive sign of hidden virtues being recognized. You do not need to shout to be heard; your natural talents and good character will naturally attract the right opportunities to you.

39.title: The Arrow Misses the Mark
39.verse:
The archer pulls the string with all his might,
But suddenly the wind disrupts the flight.
The arrow falls upon the barren ground,
The target missed, and nothing to be found.
39.interpretation: A warning of failed plans or misdirected efforts. Despite your hard work, unpredictable external factors may cause you to miss your goal. Take time to realign before trying again.

40.title: The Sun and Moon Together
40.verse:
The sun and moon are shining in the sky,
A perfect balance catches every eye.
The Yin and Yang are dancing in the light,
A harmony that makes the whole world bright.
40.interpretation: An incredibly auspicious fortune indicating perfect balance, harmony, and ultimate success. Partnerships, marriages, and joint ventures are highly favored and will bring immense joy.

41.title: The Wandering Monk
41.verse:
A wandering monk walks down the dusty road,
With nothing but a bowl to bear his load.
He seeks enlightenment from place to place,
A quiet journey moving at its pace.
41.interpretation: A period of spiritual growth, self-discovery, or seeking. Material gains may be slow, but you should focus on learning and inner peace. Trust the journey, even if the destination is unclear.

42.title: The Withered Tree Blossoms
42.verse:
The winter leaves a withered, barren tree,
But spring returns to set the blossoms free.
New life erupts upon the ancient wood,
A sudden transformation, grand and good.
42.interpretation: A highly favorable sign of renewal and second chances. A project or relationship you thought was lost or dead will suddenly revive, bringing unexpected joy and success.

43.title: The Tiger Leaves the Mountain
43.verse:
The mighty tiger leaves his mountain lair,
To walk among the valleys down there.
His power wanes outside his native land,
He must be careful where he takes his stand.
43.interpretation: You may be stepping out of your comfort zone or area of expertise. While you have strength, you are currently in unfamiliar territory. Proceed with caution and do not be overconfident.

44.title: The Raging Storm
44.verse:
The sky turns black, the furious winds arise,
A heavy darkness covers up the eyes.
The storm destroys whatever blocks its path,
You cannot stand against nature's wrath.
44.interpretation: A severe warning of impending crisis, massive upheaval, or overwhelming obstacles. Do not fight the current situation; find shelter, protect yourself, and wait for the danger to pass.

45.title: The Treasure in the Sand
45.verse:
A golden coin is hidden in the sand,
Just waiting for a lucky, seeking hand.
The tide recedes and leaves the prize behind,
A happy fortune for the one who finds.
45.interpretation: A positive omen of unexpected gains or discovering something valuable that was previously overlooked. Keep your eyes open for hidden opportunities around you.

46.title: The Blind Man Leads
46.verse:
A blind man tries to lead the way ahead,
But stumbles blindly where he shouldn't tread.
The path is lost, the followers confused,
A foolish journey leaving all bruised.
46.interpretation: A warning against following bad advice or poorly conceived plans. You or someone leading you lacks the necessary vision or knowledge. Stop and reassess before continuing.

47.title: The Golden Harvest
47.verse:
The autumn fields are heavy with the grain,
The perfect balance of the sun and rain.
The barns are full, the farmers sing with glee,
A life of wealth and sweet prosperity.
47.interpretation: An exceptionally prosperous fortune. Your hard work has culminated in a magnificent reward. Enjoy the fruits of your labor, as wealth, health, and happiness are abundant.

48.title: The Sturdy Foundation
48.verse:
The masons lay the stones with heavy hands,
To build a tower looking o'er the lands.
Though slow the progress, solid is the wall,
A lasting fortress that will never fall.
48.interpretation: Slow and steady progress leads to lasting success. Focus on building a strong foundation in your current endeavors rather than rushing for quick results.

49.title: The Foggy Mountain Pass
49.verse:
Thick fog descends upon the mountain high,
Concealing every star within the sky.
The traveler loses sight of where to go,
And wanders blindly in the mist below.
49.interpretation: A period of confusion and lack of clarity. Do not make major decisions now, as you cannot see the full picture. Wait for the fog to lift before proceeding.

50.title: The Calm Lake
50.verse:
The water's surface is a mirror clear,
No wind to stir, no storm to fear.
Maintain the course and keep your peace,
Let restless thoughts and worries cease.
50.interpretation: A neutral fortune. It is a time for stability rather than bold moves. Maintain your current path and avoid unnecessary risks.

51.title: The Dragon and Phoenix Dance
51.verse:
The dragon spirals up to meet the sun,
The phoenix joins the dance, two hearts as one.
A joyous union blessed by heaven's grace,
Brings peace and fortune to this happy place.
51.interpretation: An exceptionally auspicious omen for relationships, marriages, and business partnerships. Perfect harmony brings immense joy, success, and mutual benefit.

52.title: The Glistening Dewdrop
52.verse:
The morning dew shines brightly on the leaf,
A tiny jewel, beautiful but brief.
The sun soon rises, melting it away,
A fleeting fortune lasting but a day.
52.interpretation: You may experience small, temporary gains or fleeting moments of joy. Appreciate them, but do not rely on them for long-term stability. Maintain a realistic outlook.

53.title: The Snake in the Grass
53.verse:
The meadow looks so green and soft to tread,
But poison lurks within the flower bed.
A hidden serpent waits to strike the heel,
A sudden danger that the leaves conceal.
53.interpretation: A severe warning of hidden enemies, betrayal, or unforeseen disasters disguised as opportunities. Be extremely cautious of offers that seem too good to be true.

54.title: The Heavenly Peach
54.verse:
The mystic orchard bears a shining fruit,
A heavenly peach grown from a magic root.
To taste its nectar brings a lengthened life,
And banishes all sickness, pain, and strife.
54.interpretation: A highly positive sign of good health, longevity, and sudden blessings. You will receive unexpected help or a fortunate turn of events that greatly improves your well-being.

55.title: The River Grinds the Stone
55.verse:
The rushing river wears the stone away,
Through constant motion, night succeeding day.
What seems impossible to human might,
Is gently conquered by the water's flight.
55.interpretation: Persistence overcomes all obstacles. Your continuous, gentle efforts will eventually break through the toughest barriers. Keep going and do not lose faith.

56.title: The Spider's Web
56.verse:
The careless fly is caught within the thread,
A sticky prison woven overhead.
The more it struggles, tighter grows the snare,
A helpless victim trapped within the air.
56.interpretation: You are entangled in a complicated or restrictive situation. Struggling wildly will only make things worse. You need outside help or a very careful strategy to free yourself.

57.title: The Swallow Returns
57.verse:
The winter ends, the swallow finds its way,
Back to the eaves where it once used to play.
The old familiar sights are seen once more,
A gentle greeting at the open door.
57.interpretation: A time of return, nostalgia, or reconnecting with the past. Things are stabilizing. It is a good time to revisit old projects or mend past relationships, though sweeping new successes are unlikely right now.

58.title: The Beating Drum
58.verse:
The heavy drum is struck with mighty sound,
Its thunder echoes all the world around.
Your name is spoken far across the sea,
A glorious triumph for all eyes to see.
58.interpretation: A spectacular fortune of fame, recognition, and public success. Your achievements will be celebrated widely, and your reputation will soar to new heights.

59.title: Mending the Roof
59.verse:
The sky is clear, but autumn winds blow chill,
Go mend the leaking roof upon the hill.
Prepare today before the winter rain,
To save yourself from future damp and pain.
59.interpretation: A practical reminder to prepare for future difficulties while times are calm. Take care of neglected duties, finances, or health matters now to avoid problems later.

60.title: The Full Harvest Moon
60.verse:
The silver moon is perfectly completely round,
Shedding a peaceful light upon the ground.
The family gathers at the open gate,
Enjoying all the blessings of their fate.
60.interpretation: A wonderful omen of completeness, family unity, and satisfaction. Whatever you are working towards is coming to a successful and fulfilling conclusion.

61.title: The Broken Sword
61.verse:
The warrior draws his weapon for the fight,
But rust has eaten through the metal bright.
The blade snaps cleanly at the sudden blow,
Leaving him helpless to the coming foe.
61.interpretation: A warning of lost strength or failed defenses. You are ill-prepared for the challenges ahead, or a tool/partnership you rely on will suddenly fail you. Retreat and regroup.

62.title: The Resting Traveler
62.verse:
The dusty traveler finds a shady tree,
And sits beneath the branches, breathing free.
The journey's end is still a mile away,
But rest is needed for the weary day.
62.interpretation: You are halfway to your goal, but you need a break. This is a neutral time meant for recovery rather than pushing forward. Take a breath before continuing your journey.

63.title: The Golden Pavilion
63.verse:
A golden temple shines upon the hill,
Where heavenly music keeps the spirits still.
Great honor and immense prosperity,
Are granted to your entire family.
63.interpretation: A spectacular fortune promising immense wealth, high social standing, and divine protection. Your current path is blessed, leading to extraordinary success.

64.title: The Poisoned Well
64.verse:
The village thirsts beneath the summer sun,
But to the local well they must not run.
The water there is tainted, dark, and sour,
Bringing severe destruction in an hour.
64.interpretation: An urgent warning of toxicity in your environment, business, or relationships. Do not partake in current offers, as they are corrupted and will cause immense harm.

65.title: The Gentle Spring Rain
65.verse:
A gentle shower falls upon the field,
Ensuring that the coming crops will yield.
The dry and cracking earth drinks up the grace,
A quiet blessing falling into place.
65.interpretation: A very positive sign of timely help and steady growth. Small but continuous blessings will nourish your projects, ensuring they eventually produce a wonderful harvest.

66.title: The Autumn Leaf
66.verse:
A single crimson leaf falls from the tree,
And dances on the wind for all to see.
It lands upon the river, drifting slow,
Accepting exactly where the currents go.
66.interpretation: A time of transition and letting go. You must accept that a cycle is ending. Do not fight the natural flow of events; ride the current with grace.

67.title: The Howling Wolf
67.verse:
The lonely wolf howls at the midnight sky,
A chilling sound that makes the courage die.
The flock is scattered, shivering in fright,
As shadows close around the dying light.
67.interpretation: A warning of impending fear, isolation, or loss. Rivals or bad luck are circling your endeavors. Be highly protective of your assets and avoid risky environments.

68.title: The Thriving Garden
68.verse:
The garden blooms with every kind of flower,
Cared for by the sun and frequent shower.
The bees are buzzing, collecting all the sweet,
A place where beauty and abundance meet.
68.interpretation: A favorable omen of thriving businesses, growing families, or expanding wealth. Your careful tending to your duties is producing a beautiful and rewarding result.

69.title: The Emperor's Carriage
69.verse:
The royal carriage rolls into the town,
The Emperor himself is stepping down.
He points to you and calls you by your name,
Bestowing sudden wealth and lasting fame.
69.interpretation: An incredibly rare and powerful fortune. You will receive massive support from the highest authorities or incredibly influential figures. Unprecedented success is yours.

70.title: The Weaver's Silk
70.verse:
The weaver works the loom from morn till night,
Transforming simple threads to pure delight.
A masterpiece of silk is slowly made,
A brilliant tapestry that will not fade.
70.interpretation: A favorable sign for creative projects and long-term efforts. Your dedication to your craft or daily work will result in something beautiful and highly valued by others.

71.title: The Leaking Pitcher
71.verse:
You draw the water from the deepest well,
But drops are falling where the shadows dwell.
A hidden crack drains all your work away,
Leaving you thirsty at the close of day.
71.interpretation: A warning of wasted resources or hidden losses. You are putting effort or money into a situation that cannot sustain it. Find and fix the leak before proceeding.

72.title: The River Meets the Sea
72.verse:
The winding river leaves the mountain steep,
To join the ocean, boundless, vast, and deep.
All boundaries vanish in the roaring tide,
A glorious destiny spreading far and wide.
72.interpretation: A magnificent fortune representing ultimate fulfillment and the expansion of your horizons. You are stepping into a phase of boundless potential and immense success.

73.title: The Sleeping Hound
73.verse:
The faithful hound sleeps by the quiet door,
There are no strangers walking on the floor.
The house is safe, but nothing stirs the air,
A peaceful, uneventful time to share.
73.interpretation: A completely neutral time. There are no immediate threats, but also no exciting opportunities. Enjoy the peace and quiet; do not try to stir up unnecessary action.

74.title: The Singing Cricket
74.verse:
The autumn winds begin to blow quite cold,
But by the hearth, a joyful song is told.
The little cricket chirps a merry tune,
A cozy comfort underneath the moon.
74.interpretation: A positive sign of finding joy in small things and domestic comfort. Even if the outside world seems harsh, your home and close relationships will provide warmth and happiness.

75.title: Clouds Obscure the Moon
75.verse:
Thick clouds gather in the evening sky,
Hiding the bright moon from the watchful eye.
Steps must be taken with utmost care,
Lest you stumble in the darkened air.
75.interpretation: A warning to be cautious. You may face obstacles or confusion in the near future. Delay major decisions and proceed carefully.

76.title: The Blocked Pass
76.verse:
The mountain rumbles and the rocks descend,
Bringing your journey to a sudden end.
The only road is buried deep in stone,
You stand defeated, stranded, and alone.
76.interpretation: A severe warning of an insurmountable obstacle. Your path is completely blocked, and trying to climb over the wreckage will lead to ruin. You must abandon this route entirely.

77.title: The Ancient Bell
77.verse:
The temple bell tolls slowly in the night,
A heavy sound that puts the birds to flight.
It calls to mind the days of long ago,
A steady rhythm, solemn, deep, and slow.
77.interpretation: A time for reflection rather than action. Look to the past to learn lessons for the future. Patience and reverence for tradition are required right now.

78.title: The Playful Macaque
78.verse:
The monkey steals the peach right from your hand,
And scatters all your papers in the sand.
A foolish nuisance causing great delay,
Distracting you from walking on your way.
78.interpretation: You are being plagued by minor annoyances, distractions, or deceitful people. These small interferences can ruin your plans if you do not strictly discipline yourself and your surroundings.

79.title: The Golden Key
79.verse:
A heavy chest is locked and bound in steel,
Concealing what the shadows would conceal.
But in your hand you hold the golden key,
To open up the lock and set it free.
79.interpretation: A very positive sign of finding solutions. You finally possess the knowledge, connection, or tool needed to solve a long-standing problem or unlock a new opportunity.

80.title: The Dragon's Pearl
80.verse:
The mighty dragon guards a glowing sphere,
A pearl of wisdom, absolutely clear.
He drops the treasure gently at your feet,
A gift of heaven, perfectly complete.
80.interpretation: An incredibly auspicious reading denoting the attainment of ultimate wisdom, wealth, or a lifelong dream. You are receiving a rare and powerful blessing.

81.title: The Untethered Skiff
81.verse:
The little boat slips softly from its knot,
And leaves behind the quiet resting spot.
It glides upon the lake without an oar,
Just drifting slowly to another shore.
81.interpretation: You are currently not in control of your direction, but the waters are calm. Let things unfold naturally for now. Do not fight the current; see where it takes you.

82.title: The Frost on the Grass
82.verse:
The sudden frost descends upon the lawn,
The summer's green is instantly withdrawn.
The tender shoots are withered in the cold,
A bitter end to what was young and bold.
82.interpretation: A warning of a sudden end to a promising endeavor or relationship. External circumstances will chill your progress. Protect your assets and prepare for a harsh period.

83.title: Counsel of the Sage
83.verse:
An elder speaks with wisdom in his eyes,
His words are gentle, practical, and wise.
You listen closely to the ancient lore,
And find the answers you were searching for.
83.interpretation: A positive sign that you will receive excellent advice. Seek out a mentor or an experienced professional; their guidance will lead you directly to success.

84.title: The Falling Star
84.verse:
A brilliant star streaks downward from the height,
And vanishes completely from the night.
What once was high is buried in the dust,
A sudden failure of a sacred trust.
84.interpretation: A dire warning of a sudden fall from grace, loss of status, or the collapse of a major aspiration. Pride or misplaced trust will lead to a rapid and devastating decline.

85.title: The Bamboo Flute
85.verse:
The shepherd plays a quiet, lonely tune,
Beneath the pale and unassuming moon.
The melody is sweet but fades away,
A peaceful passing of an empty day.
85.interpretation: A time of quiet reflection and simple routines. Do not expect grand events or major progress. Enjoy the stillness and maintain your current position.

86.title: The Scent of Pine
86.verse:
The winter wind blows through the ancient pine,
A fragrant scent that feels almost divine.
The tree stands evergreen amidst the snow,
A sturdy strength that continues to grow.
86.interpretation: A highly favorable sign of resilience and lasting health. Your steadfast nature will see you through any minor hardships, leading to long-term success.

87.title: The Imperial Seal
87.verse:
The heavy stamp is pressed upon the page,
Marking the start of a glorious age.
Authority and power are bestowed,
A brilliant light upon a golden road.
87.interpretation: An incredibly auspicious fortune indicating official recognition, promotion, or legal victory. You are granted the power and authority to achieve your grandest ambitions.

88.title: The Tangled Kite
88.verse:
The paper kite flies high into the breeze,
But catches tightly in the highest trees.
The string is pulled until it snaps in two,
A sudden loss of what belonged to you.
88.interpretation: A warning of overreaching or losing control. Your ambitions have gotten tangled up in complications. Forcing the issue will only result in a permanent break.

89.title: The Distant Bell
89.verse:
A muffled ringing echoes from afar,
Beneath the twinkling of a single star.
You cannot clearly hear the message sent,
A quiet mystery of vague intent.
89.interpretation: Information or results are delayed. You only have part of the picture right now. Be patient and wait for clearer signals before making your next move.

90.title: The Collapsing Wall
90.verse:
The ancient stones can bear the weight no more,
And crash in ruin on the dusty floor.
The house is open to the bitter wind,
A devastating loss where you have sinned.
90.interpretation: A severe warning of foundational collapse. A project, business, or relationship is falling apart due to past neglect or poor planning. Seek shelter immediately.

91.title: The River's Source
91.verse:
You walk upstream to find the hidden spring,
Where pure and crystal waters start to sing.
The journey upward brings a sweet reward,
A wealth of clarity safely restored.
91.interpretation: A positive sign of getting to the root of a matter. By tracing a problem to its origin, you will find a brilliant and refreshing solution that brings great success.

92.title: The Golden Crown
92.verse:
A crown of gold is placed upon your head,
And all your former worries now are dead.
The kingdom cheers to see you on the throne,
A massive fortune that is yours alone.
92.interpretation: A magnificent blessing representing the pinnacle of success, leadership, and wealth. You will reach the absolute top of your field or achieve a supreme personal victory.

93.title: The Rusting Lock
93.verse:
The iron lock is rusted by the rain,
You turn the heavy key but all in vain.
The door remains shut tight against your hand,
A stubborn barrier you cannot command.
93.interpretation: A warning of stubborn obstacles and denied access. You are locked out of an opportunity, and your current methods will not work. Do not force it; the timing is entirely wrong.

94.title: The Sleeping Owl
94.verse:
The owl sleeps soundly through the glaring light,
And waits in silence for the coming night.
Its wisdom lies in knowing when to wake,
A careful pause for its own safety's sake.
94.interpretation: Now is not the time to act. Like the owl in daylight, you are out of your element. Conserve your energy and wait for a more favorable environment to apply your skills.

95.title: The Painted Fan
95.verse:
The artist paints a landscape on the fan,
A masterpiece of a most careful plan.
A gentle breeze is summoned by your hand,
To cool the heat upon the summer land.
95.interpretation: A highly favorable sign of elegance, diplomacy, and turning a situation to your advantage. Your tact and careful planning will bring relief and beautiful results.

96.title: The Dragon Boat
96.verse:
The painted boat races across the lake,
With drums resounding for the winner's sake.
The oars move perfectly in joyous time,
A sudden victory, grand and sublime.
96.interpretation: An exceptionally auspicious omen for teamwork and competition. With the support of others, you will rapidly outpace your rivals and achieve a glorious, celebrated victory.

97.title: The Lost Compass
97.verse:
The needle spins and points in every way,
The sailor doesn't know which course to lay.
The stormy sea surrounds the wooden hull,
A dangerous journey that is never dull.
97.interpretation: A severe warning of lost direction and dangerous confusion. You are navigating without clear guidance. Stop moving forward immediately until you regain your bearings.

98.title: The Snail's Pace
98.verse:
The tiny snail moves slowly up the wall,
It takes a day to climb and not to fall.
The progress made is barely seen by eye,
But still it creeps beneath the open sky.
98.interpretation: Progress is agonizingly slow, but it is happening. Do not be frustrated by the lack of speed. Maintain your grip and keep moving forward, no matter how small the steps.

99.title: The Final Peak
99.verse:
The mountain peak is standing just ahead,
The arduous journey leaves behind all dread.
The view from here is breathtaking and clear,
A perfect ending to a weary year.
99.interpretation: A wonderful sign of successful completion. You are about to reach the summit of a long and difficult endeavor. The results will be well worth the effort you invested.

100.title: The Broken Branch
100.verse:
A sudden storm snaps the ancient tree,
Leaves scatter wildly across the sea.
Plans unravel and hopes are dashed,
Wait for the storm to finally pass.
100.interpretation: A very challenging time lies ahead. It is best to lay low, avoid new ventures, and focus on protecting what you have until conditions improve.
